serena_lsp: 23 tools stable R4-30. activate_project --project ~1.3s warm. find_symbol broad 70s+ (prefer Grep). Receiver methods need '(*Type).method'.

Fix: bump all 3 to 22. Self_consistency pattern (proven-to-land).

patterns.ci_enforce: cgo.yml:1078 POSITIVE LINTER_FLAGS, R30=12 flags. Append flag for zero-vio linter; convert-to-zero or //nolint-annotate first for non-zero.
patterns.precision_fix_lands: Single-file linter precision/enforce fixes land ~1day: sg24a1 R25, sg27a1 R28, sg28a1 enforce R29, sg29a1+sg29a2 R30. Non-near-zero (seenmapbool 60+ sites) does NOT auto-land — pivot to precision/nolint/dismiss.
patterns.new_linter_doc_lag: NEW R30: linters land in driver main.go BEFORE doc.go/README/spec_test sync (lenstringzero). Each run: diff cmd/linters/main.go analyzer list vs doc.go count vs spec_test documentedAnalyzers() — gap = self_consistency issue.
patterns.enforce_precondition_nolint: INVARIANT: all 12 enforced linters have internal/nolint. Adding nolint is enforce precondition for non-near-zero linters. lenstringzero lacks it.
patterns.team_closes_fast: Sergo issues converted to PRs + CLOSED within ~1-2 days; open_issues list usually empty. gh api issues?labels=sergo&state=all confirms landings.

bash_policy: Sandbox blocks multi-stmt compounds, ls/mkdir/cat/sed outside repo, for-loops, backtick grep, git on /tmp. go build blocked (lint via Grep/Read). gh issue/search 'Malformed version:' — USE gh api repos/.../issues?labels=sergo --jq INSTEAD (works). Glob/Read/Write work on /tmp; bash CANNOT touch /tmp/gh-aw/repo-memory. KEEP MEMORY ~10KB total; compact strategies.jsonl to ~3 recent.
